channel.title: career on Donia Chaiehloudj's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in career on Donia Chaiehloudj's Blog

item.title: My Top 5 Women Motivational Speakers in Cloud-Native Development in 2021
item.description: They are CNCF ambassadors, Docker captains, or AWS heroes. The women in tech are the game-changers of cloud-native development, sharing their knowledge about containers, Kubernetes, Docker, or DevOps topics. They inspire the new generation of girls entering into the STEM universe.
